description_long: This is a young elephant with a robust, rounded body covered in a thick, grayish-brown skin. Its large, fan-shaped ears extend outward from the sides of its head, and its trunk curves gently downward, ending in a tapered tip. The animal has two short, slightly curved tusks protruding from either side of its trunk, and its eyes are set deep beneath a prominent brow ridge. Its legs are sturdy and columnar, supporting its heavy body, and its tail is thin with a small tuft of hair at the end. The skin surface appears slightly wrinkled and matte, typical of elephant hide, and the overall proportions suggest a juvenile African elephant. The asset is depicted in a standing posture, with a gentle, naturalistic stance.
description: A juvenile African elephant with large ears, a curved trunk, and thick, wrinkled gray skin, standing upright. The body is robust and the tusks are short and slightly curved.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the wide, fan-shaped ears, curved trunk, and both tusks clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the rounded body, one visible eye, and the trunk curving forward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the broad back, both ears from behind, and the thin tail with a tuft.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the body profile, trunk, and one eye.
